error.retryable: Couldn't load translations — the translation service may be unavailable. Try again.
error.forbidden: You don't have access to this book's translations.
error.notfound: These translations could not be found.
error.chapters_timeout: Loading the chapter list timed out — the service may be slow or down.

page.no_translations_yet: No translations for this language yet.

viewer.needs_review_title: Unresolved high-severity issues flagged by the verifier — review recommended.
viewer.publish_confirm: This translation has {{count}} unresolved high-severity issue(s) flagged by the verifier. Set it active anyway?
viewer.glossary_stale_title: The glossary changed after this translation — it may be outdated.

confirm_name.button_title: Confirm a corrected name into the glossary
confirm_name.title: Confirm a name in the glossary
confirm_name.description: Set the verified {{lang}} spelling for a name. Affected translations are then flagged stale so you can re-translate.
confirm_name.not_found: That name isn't in the glossary yet — add it in the Glossary editor first.
confirm_name.no_name_attr: That entry has no name attribute to update.
confirm_name.error: Couldn't confirm the name. Please try again.

compare.original_unavailable: The original text is currently unavailable.

review.correct_title: Edit translation blocks inline — corrections save to your edited version and feed learning
review.newer_machine_available: A newer machine translation (v{{num}}) is available — your edits stay active until you adopt it
review.adopt_confirm: Adopt the newer machine translation as the active version? Your edited version stays saved but is no longer the published one.

matrix.cell_manage_versions: v{{num}} · {{count}} version(s) — click to manage / publish
matrix.cell_stale_title: Out of date — the glossary changed since this was translated
matrix.select_affected_title: Select the chapters affected by glossary changes to re-translate
matrix.no_chapters_desc: Create chapters first, then come back to translate them.
matrix.title: Translation Matrix
matrix.no_translations_desc: Start by translating your chapters into another language.
matrix.orphan_footnote: {{count}} translation(s) belong to chapters that are no longer active.

segments.title: Segment status
segments.retranslate_failed: Re-translation could not be started. Please try again.
